name: Washing Machine Vibration Isolation Base
pros: Exceptional 4.58★ rating from 2,314 reviews shows proven effectiveness at reducing noise/vibration
Works with both drum and top-load machines; height-adjustable for varying requirements
At ¥5,500, delivers outstanding value for solving a common apartment problem
cons: Basic rubber mat design offers no major innovation; many similar products exist
May require periodic replacement as rubber degrades under continuous vibration exposure
shortDescription: Highly-rated vibration isolation base compatible with all washer types; reduces noise and movement.
review: This is one of Japan's most practical and best-reviewed small appliance accessories. With 2,300+ reviews and a 4.58★ rating, the TatsutsuFt isolation base solves a real problem in Japanese apartments: washer vibration and noise. At just ¥5,500, it's a no-brainer investment for anyone sharing walls or living in tight quarters. Works on both drum and top-load machines, and installation is straightforward enough for anyone. This is exactly the kind of under-the-radar product that makes daily life in Japan smoother.
